description: ADK chiplet-internal pad layer vocabulary. The CANONICAL layers the black-box generator emits and that gds_to_kicad's generic.lyp assumes by default, for chiplets from commercial / closed PDK nodes that ship only metal pads + pad names with no .lyp. Distinct from config/layers.json, which is the assembly/exchange registry. The INPUT side (reading an arbitrary commercial pads-only GDS whose layer numbers are unknown) never consults this file; it is handled by --pad-layer-number or densest-layer auto-detect.

pad_drawing.purpose: Bond-pad metal geometry on a black-box / pads-only chiplet. One polygon per pad.

pad_text.purpose: Pad-name text labels, associated to pads by proximity. Datatype 25 mirrors the PDK .text convention so the existing text auto-pairing in pin_extractor works.

outline.purpose: Die mechanical outline. The generator may also mirror it onto exchange0 (190/0) so the assembly DRC deck and hyp_to_gds see the die boundary.
